title: New Album "Slavic Soul" Available Now
description: The latest collection featuring masterpieces of Russian and European repertoire...
body:
Vitaly Yushmanov is proud to announce the release of his latest album, 'Slavic Soul'. This collection features a carefully curated selection of masterpieces from the Russian and European baritone repertoire, showcasing the depth and versatility of his voice.

Recorded at the prestigious Suntory Hall in Tokyo, the album captures the intimate and powerful nature of these works. From the dramatic intensity of Tchaikovsky to the lyrical beauty of Rachmaninoff, 'Slavic Soul' is a testament to Vitaly's artistic vision and technical mastery.
